subcodes.first_line: O Jináb-i-Ḥájí Mírzá Ḥusayn! The reply to thy letter hath been delayed owing to certain known impediments; pray excuse [me] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب حاجی میرزا حسین جواب مکتوب نظر بموانع معلوم تاخیر افتاد معذور دارید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @wisdom [hikmat]
